THECURSEDMOD-RITE.selectionScreenPrompt: Exhaust. Choosing a Curse Activates the Rite's Effect.
THECURSEDMOD-DREGS.title: Dregs
THECURSEDMOD-STRIKE_THE_CURSED.title: Strike
THECURSEDMOD-DEFEND_THE_CURSED.title: Defend
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_WAND.title: Cursed Wand
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_WAND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Dregs[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-CLEAN_UP_WORKSHOP.title: Clean up Workshop
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_MACE.title: Cursed Mace
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_MACE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Add a [gold]Dregs[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_SHIV.title: Cursed Shiv
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_SHIV.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Dregs[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_STAFF.title: Cursed Staff
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_BOOMERANG.title: Cursed Boomerang
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_BOOMERANG.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
Add a [gold]Dregs[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_BLADE.title: Cursed Blade
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_BLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add a [gold]Dregs[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-SPITEFUL_STRIKE.title: Spiteful Strike
THECURSEDMOD-SPITEFUL_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you [gold]Exhausted[/gold] a [gold]Curse[/gold] card via [gold]Rite[/gold] this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
THECURSEDMOD-VITAL_STRIKE.title: Vital Strike
THECURSEDMOD-REAR_STRIKE.title: Rear Strike
THECURSEDMOD-RAVING_STAFF.title: Raving Staff
THECURSEDMOD-RAVING_STAFF.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy X times.
[gold]Karma[/gold] {KarmaPower:diff()} X times.
THECURSEDMOD-WIELD.title: Wield
THECURSEDMOD-OBSCURATION.title: Obscuration
THECURSEDMOD-RAPID_MOVEMENT.title: Rapid Movement
THECURSEDMOD-WEAR_CLOAK.title: Wear Cloak
THECURSEDMOD-WEAR_CLOAK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have any [gold]Circle[/gold] card in your [gold]Hand[/gold], put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-WEAR_CLOAK.selectionScreenP: Choose a card to return to your Hand.
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_ARMOUR.title: Cursed Armour
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_ARMOUR.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Shuffle 2 random [gold]Curse[/gold] cards into your [gold]Draw pile[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-DOUBLE_SHIELD.title: Double Shield
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_AMULET.title: Cursed Amulet
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_AMULET.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw 1 card.
Shuffle a random [gold]Curse[/gold] card into your [gold]Draw pile[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-SMOKESCREEN.title: Smokescreen
THECURSEDMOD-ASHES_TO_ASHES.title: Ashes to Ashes
THECURSEDMOD-REPENTANCE.title: Repentance
THECURSEDMOD-REPENTANCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If [gold]Karma[/gold] damage is scheduled this turn, gain {KarmaBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] instead.
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_MIRROR.title: Cursed Mirror
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_MIRROR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add an [gold]Enthralled[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-SCINTILLA.selectionScreenPr: Choose a card to transform into Dregs.
THECURSEDMOD-SCINTILLA.title: Scintilla
THECURSEDMOD-SCINTILLA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Transform a card in your [gold]Discard pile[/gold] into [gold]Dregs[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-BLESSING_IN_DISGUISE.title: Blessing in Disguise
THECURSEDMOD-BLESSING_IN_DISGUISE.descri:
Exhaust all [gold]Curse[/gold] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_SPELLBOOK.title: Cursed Spellbook
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_SPELLBOOK.descriptio:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Shuffle a random [gold]Curse[/gold] card into your [gold]Draw pile[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-FLESH_FROM_BONE.title: Flesh from Bone
THECURSEDMOD-ARCANE_SWEEP.title: Arcane Sweep
THECURSEDMOD-ARCANE_SWEEP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If you have a [gold]Circle[/gold] card in your [gold]Hand[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies again.
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE_OF_FLAME.title: Circle of Flame
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE_OF_FLAME.description: [gold]Circle[/gold] : Whenever you play an Attack card, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE_OF_WARD.title: Circle of Ward
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE_OF_WARD.description: [gold]Circle[/gold] : Whenever you play a Skill card, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE_OF_AMPLIFICATION.des: [gold]Circle[/gold] : Whenever you play a Power card, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE_OF_RITUAL.title: Circle of Ritual
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE_OF_RITUAL.descriptio: [gold]Circle[/gold] : Whenever you play a [gold]Rite[/gold] card, draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE_OF_FOCUS.title: Circle of Focus
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE_OF_FOCUS.description: [gold]Circle[/gold] : Whenever you play a card that costs {CostThreshold:diff()} or more, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
THECURSEDMOD-ARCANE_TRIGGER.title: Arcane Trigger
THECURSEDMOD-ARCANE_TRIGGER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Force all [gold]Circle[/gold] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to trigger, ignoring their conditions.
THECURSEDMOD-MANA_BULLET.title: Mana Bullet
THECURSEDMOD-MALEVOLENCE.title: Malevolence
THECURSEDMOD-MALEVOLENCE.description:
Add a random [gold]Rite[/gold] card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
It's free to play this turn.
THECURSEDMOD-PREPARE_RITE.title: Prepare Rite
THECURSEDMOD-PREPARE_RITE.description:
Transform 1 card in your [gold]Draw pile[/gold] into [gold]Dregs[/gold].
Next turn, draw 2 cards.
THECURSEDMOD-PREPARE_RITE.selectionScree: Choose a card to transform into Dregs.
THECURSEDMOD-TROUBLOUS_MINION.title: Troublous Minion
THECURSEDMOD-TROUBLOUS_MINION.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a random [gold]Curse[/gold] card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Shuffle this card into your [gold]Draw pile[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-RECYCLABLE_WASTE.title: Recyclable Waste
THECURSEDMOD-RECYCLABLE_WASTE.descriptio:
All [gold]Dregs[/gold] have [gold]Retain[/gold] for this combat.
Add 2 [gold]Dregs[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-LUCKY_CHARM.title: Lucky Charm
THECURSEDMOD-MANA_CIRCULATION.title: Mana Circulation
THECURSEDMOD-MANA_CIRCULATION.descriptio: The first time a [gold]Curse[/gold] card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold] each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
THECURSEDMOD-HELLFIRE_BREATHING.title: Hellfire Breathing
THECURSEDMOD-HELLFIRE_BREATHING.descript: Whenever you draw an [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card, deal {HellfireBreathingPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
THECURSEDMOD-DENYING_FATE.title: Denying Fate
THECURSEDMOD-DENYING_FATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Delay [gold]Karma[/gold] damage scheduled this turn to the next turn.
THECURSEDMOD-FATAL_LEAP.title: Fatal Leap
THECURSEDMOD-FATAL_LEAP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Karma[/gold] damage is scheduled this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw 1 card.
THECURSEDMOD-FORBIDDEN_FLAME.title: Forbidden Flame
THECURSEDMOD-FORBIDDEN_COMBO.title: Forbidden Combo
THECURSEDMOD-FORBIDDEN_WALLOP.title: Forbidden Wallop
THECURSEDMOD-FORBIDDEN_WALLOP.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage.
[gold]Karma[/gold] {KarmaPower:diff()}.
THECURSEDMOD-FORBIDDEN_RAID.title: Forbidden Raid
THECURSEDMOD-IGNORE_PAIN.title: Ignore Pain
THECURSEDMOD-IGNORE_PAIN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Rite[/gold] : You receive 50% less damage from [gold]Karma[/gold] this turn.
THECURSEDMOD-ROLLING_OVER_DEBT.title: Rolling over Debt
THECURSEDMOD-ROLLING_OVER_DEBT.descripti: Whenever you are about to take [gold]Karma[/gold] damage, gain {RollingOverDebtPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-CYCLE_OF_DEPRAVITY.title: Cycle of Depravity
THECURSEDMOD-CYCLE_OF_DEPRAVITY.descript: At the start of your turn, draw 2 cards if [gold]Karma[/gold] damage is scheduled this turn.
THECURSEDMOD-TEAR_GRIMOIRE.title: Tear Grimoire
THECURSEDMOD-TEAR_GRIMOIRE.description:
Attacks that cost 2 or more are played an extra time.
At the start of your turn, [gold]Karma[/gold] {KarmaPower:diff()}.
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE_OF_OVERCURRENT.title: Circle of Overcurrent
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE_OF_OVERCURRENT.descr: [gold]Circle[/gold] : Whenever you play a Skill card, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy. Increases this card's damage by {DamageIncrement:diff()} this combat.
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE_OF_WINDFURY.title: Circle of Windfury
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE_OF_WINDFURY.descript: [gold]Circle[/gold] : Whenever you play a 0-cost card, draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
THECURSEDMOD-ARCANE_DISCHARGE.title: Arcane Discharge
THECURSEDMOD-ARCANE_DISCHARGE.descriptio:
Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to {ExtraDamage:diff()} times the number of [gold]Circle[/gold] effects triggered this combat.{InCombat:cond:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.)|}
THECURSEDMOD-DOMAIN_EXPANSION.title: Domain Expansion
THECURSEDMOD-DOMAIN_EXPANSION.descriptio:
Force all [gold]Circle[/gold] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to trigger {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} times, ignoring their conditions.
[gold]Karma[/gold] {KarmaPower:diff()}.
THECURSEDMOD-GRACE.title: Grace
THECURSEDMOD-GRACE.description: [gold]Karma[/gold] damage is dealt at the end of your turn after next, instead of next turn.
THECURSEDMOD-ANGER_CONTROL.title: Anger Control
THECURSEDMOD-ANGER_CONTROL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Increases this card's hit count by 1 this combat.
Add a [gold]Normality[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-DIE_TOGETHER.title: Die Together
THECURSEDMOD-DIE_TOGETHER.description:
[gold]Karma[/gold] damage is also dealt to ALL enemies this combat.
[gold]Karma[/gold] {KarmaPower:diff()}.
THECURSEDMOD-FORBIDDEN_FORM.title: Forbidden Form
THECURSEDMOD-FORBIDDEN_FORM.description:
Shuffle 3 random [gold]Curse[/gold] cards into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
Whenever you draw a [gold]Curse[/gold] card, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
[gold]Karma[/gold] {KarmaPower:diff()}.
THECURSEDMOD-FORBIDDEN_BLUDGEON.title: Forbidden Bludgeon
THECURSEDMOD-ESSENCE_DRAIN.title: Essence Drain
THECURSEDMOD-ESSENCE_DRAIN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Heal HP equal to unblocked damage.
THECURSEDMOD-DARK_BARRIER.title: Dark Barrier
THECURSEDMOD-MIRACLE_ALCHEMY.title: Miracle Alchemy
THECURSEDMOD-ANTI_AGING.title: Anti Aging
THECURSEDMOD-ANTI_AGING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Rite[/gold] : Raise your max HP by {MaxHp:diff()}.
THECURSEDMOD-DEMONIC_BLADE.title: Demonic Blade
THECURSEDMOD-DEMONIC_BLADE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Curse[/gold] card [gold]Exhausted[/gold] via [gold]Rite[/gold] this combat.
THECURSEDMOD-CALL_OF_THE_ANCIENT.title: Call of the Ancient
THECURSEDMOD-CALL_OF_THE_ANCIENT.descrip: This turn, the next {CallOfTheAncientPower:diff()} [gold]Rite[/gold] {CallOfTheAncientPower:plural:card activates its|cards activate their} [gold]Rite[/gold] effect an extra time.
THECURSEDMOD-HELP_OF_THE_DEAD.title: Help of the Dead
THECURSEDMOD-HELP_OF_THE_DEAD.descriptio: [gold]Rite[/gold] : Add 1 [gold]Replay[/gold] to a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-HELP_OF_THE_DEAD.selectionS: Choose a card to add Replay to.
THECURSEDMOD-DUBIOUS_CONTRACT.title: Dubious Contract
THECURSEDMOD-DUBIOUS_CONTRACT.descriptio: At the start of your turn, add a random [gold]Rite[/gold] card and a random [gold]Curse[/gold] card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-NEOWS_MIGHT.title: Neow's Might
THECURSEDMOD-NEOWS_MIGHT.description:
Reduce the cost of ALL cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] by 1 this turn.
[gold]Karma[/gold] {KarmaPower:diff()}.
THECURSEDMOD-FORBIDDEN_RELIC.title: Forbidden Relic
THECURSEDMOD-FORBIDDEN_ELIXIR.title: Forbidden Elixir
THECURSEDMOD-FORBIDDEN_ELIXIR.descriptio:
At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]Karma[/gold] {KarmaPower:diff()}.
THECURSEDMOD-MANA_BASTION.title: Mana Bastion
THECURSEDMOD-BATTLEMAGE.title: Battlemage
THECURSEDMOD-BATTLEMAGE.description: Whenever you activates an effect of [gold]Circle[/gold], gain {BattlemagePower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-EXODIA_BEAM.title: Exodia Beam
THECURSEDMOD-EXODIA_BEAM.description:
Can only be played if there are 5+ distinct [gold]Circle[/gold] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
